title: Kratie Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kratie, with a Z-Score of +3.03. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Kratie are extreme, with high temperatures and humidity levels at 84%. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 9.6 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 10.1 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on Kratie.
